title: paspalum scrobiculatum var. commersonii
intro: Paspalum scrobiculatum var. commersonii, also known as Commerson's paspalum, is a variety of grass belonging to the Paspalum scrobiculatum species, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Commerson's paspalum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Paspalum scrobiculatum var. commersonii can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
